title: getName()
text: getName() Returns the fully qualified name of the current Uniface JavaScript object. Object . getName() Arguments None Return Value Returns the fully-qualified name of the current object. For example, if the Object is a uniface.Entity object, the fully-qualified name is in the form ENTITY.MODEL . Exceptions The following exceptions may be thrown: uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Related Links uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Exception thrown if the object on which the function is called is no longer valid. uniface.Instance The uniface.Instance object provides access to selected properties and methods of the component instance that it represents. uniface.Occurrence The uniface.Occurrence object provides access to selected properties of the occurrence that it represents. It is returned by the getOccurrence function of the uniface.Entity object. uniface.Entity The uniface.Entity object provides access to selected properties of the component entity that it represents. It is returned by the getEntities and getEntity functions of the uniface.Instance and uniface.Occurrence objects. uniface.Field The uniface.Field object provides access to selected properties of the field that it represents. It is returned by the getField function of uniface.Occurrence. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
